name: mojo-method-api-symmetry
description: Add thin method wrappers to Mojo structs to complete API symmetry with existing free functions. Use when: (1) a free function was added to a module but no corresponding method wrapper exists on the struct, (2) closing follow-up issues about API completeness after a larger feature PR, (3) reviewing a struct's method API for missing parity with its module-level counterparts.
